statement.headerDoc:
STEP 1002 — Power × Thermodynamics × D-FUMT₈
  藤本伸樹 + Claude Opus 4.7 — 2026-04-27

  Nine theories bridging CPU/GPU power-conversion engineering with the
  D-FUMT₈ framework. Each theory is stated formally in Lean 4 and tagged
  with its D-FUMT₈ valuation.

  Tier 1 — Information ↔ Thermodynamics (情報熱力学)
  ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  T1.1  Landauer's principle (1961):
        Erasing 1 bit dissipates at least k_B · T · ln 2 of heat.
        D-FUMT₈ = ZERO  (information annihilation lower bound)
  T1.2  Bennett's reversible computing (1973):
        Any classical comput
